data.title: EV Resources Director Resigns, Leaves Company Well-Positioned
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

An announcement from EV Resources Limited ( (AU:EVR) ) is now available.

EV Resources Limited announced the resignation of Executive Director Hugh Callaghan, effective August 24, 2025, due to personal reasons. During his tenure, Callaghan played a crucial role in shaping the company’s Americas-focused critical minerals strategy and overseeing the consolidation of its project portfolio. His departure leaves EV Resources well-positioned to capitalize on its critical mineral assets, particularly in Latin America.

More about EV Resources Limited

EV Resources Limited is a company operating in the critical minerals industry, focusing on exploration and development projects. The company is primarily involved in the Americas, where it seeks to consolidate and expand its project portfolio in alignment with its strategic focus on critical minerals.

Average Trading Volume: 9,769,883

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: A$22.28M

data.title: Adelong Gold Expands Apollo Project to Secure Strategic Ground
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

An announcement from 3D Resources Limited ( (AU:ADG) ) is now available.

Adelong Gold Limited has applied for an exploration license to expand its Apollo Gold Project in Victoria, Australia, by an additional 18km of Strathbogie Granite contact, increasing the project’s total area to approximately 220 km². This strategic move is aimed at securing potential high-grade gold mineralization sites ahead of upcoming drill results and exploration programs. The Apollo project is located in the Walhalla Gold Belt, known for high-grade discoveries, and shares geological similarities with successful projects like Southern Cross Gold’s Sunday Creek. Additionally, Adelong is planning a maiden drill program at the Lauriston Gold Project, which is positioned to potentially host high-grade mineralization similar to the nearby Fosterville Mine.

More about 3D Resources Limited

Adelong Gold Limited operates in the mining industry, focusing on gold exploration and development. The company is engaged in expanding its footprint within the highly prospective gold belts of Victoria, Australia, with projects like the Apollo Gold Project and Lauriston Gold Project.

Current Market Cap: A$9.27M

For detailed information about ADG stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Terumo Acquires OrganOx to Enter Organ Transplantation Sector
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

Terumo ( (JP:4543) ) just unveiled an update.

Terumo Corporation has announced its acquisition of OrganOx Limited for approximately USD 1.5 billion, marking its strategic entry into the organ transplantation sector. This move is expected to enhance Terumo’s business portfolio and address significant unmet medical needs by improving organ preservation and utilization rates, ultimately benefiting transplant patients and healthcare providers globally.

The most recent analyst rating on (JP:4543) stock is a Buy with a Yen3165.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Terumo stock, see the JP:4543 Stock Forecast page.

More about Terumo

Terumo Corporation is a Tokyo-based company specializing in the design and manufacturing of medical devices and equipment. The company is making a strategic entry into the organ transplantation-related sector by acquiring OrganOx Limited, a leader in organ preservation devices. Terumo aims to leverage its expertise to deliver innovative solutions in the field of organ transplantation.

The latest update is out from Traka Resources Limited ( (AU:TKL) ).

Traka Resources Limited has announced a General Meeting to be held on September 24, 2025, to address several resolutions related to the issuance of shares and options. The meeting will focus on ratifying the prior issue of shares to Tranche 1 Placement Participants and approving the issuance of additional shares and options to various participants, including Tranche 2 Placement Participants, Placement Participants, AFSL Holders, and Bullseye Analytics Pte Ltd.
